title: JerkSteve
description: Adds the most annoying mob to Minecraft, as seen in the viral meme videos.
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## Information This mod was made for [this video](https://youtu.be/31NRfeU_Zdw). mod that adds the viral jerksteve meme character to minecraft. he has a variety of attack abilities such as throwing snowballs, mining blocks out from underneath players, hitting levers and buttons, and shooting a bow. he can be spawned in by placing down his camera, which is crafted using 4 iron ingots, 1 diamond, 1 observer, and 1 glass pane. he will find a player to target and then follow and terrorize them until either the player dies or his camera is destroyed. this is a fabric mod for 1.21 and 1.21.1. to use the mod on forge or neoforge, make sure you also have [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) installed. ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this mod or assets from this mod. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
